zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Burghersh於1324年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾易亞斯特 沃爾達哈姆時，他的父親Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh37歲，母親Countess Elizabeth de Verdun19歲。他於大約1343年與Maud de Kerdeston在英國英格蘭奧可福爾艾尤爾梅結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1349年6月30日在英國奧可福爾艾尤爾梅享年25歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾艾尤爾梅。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Burghersh于1324年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾易亞斯特 沃爾達哈姆时，他的父亲Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh37岁，母亲Countess Elizabeth de Verdun19岁。他于大约1343年与Maud de Kerdeston在英国英格兰奧可福爾艾尤爾梅结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1349年6月30日在英国奧可福爾艾尤爾梅享年25岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾艾尤爾梅。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Burghersh was born in 1324, in East Worldham, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, was 37 and his mother, Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, was 19. He married Maud de Kerdeston about 1343, in Ewelme, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 30 June 1349, in Ewelme, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 25, and was buried in Ewelme, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Burghersh est né en 1324, à East Worldham, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Kerdeston environ 1343, à Ewelme, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 30 juin 1349, à Ewelme, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 25 ans, et a été enterré à Ewelme, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.East Worldham, Alton, Hampshire, England: East Worldham, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John de Burghersh 1324 in East Worldham, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh 37 und seine Mutter Countess Elizabeth de Verdun 19. Er hat um 1343 in Ewelme, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Maud de Kerdeston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 30. Juni 1349 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Ewelme, Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Ewelme, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Burghersh è nato il nel 1324 nel East Worldham, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Maud de Kerdeston circa 1343, nel Ewelme, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 30 giugno 1349, nel Ewelme, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 25 anni, e fu sepolto a Ewelme, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.Ewelme, Oxfordshire, England: イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアエウエルメ
ja.Sussex, England: イギリスイギリススセックス
ja.lifeSummary: John de Burghershが1324年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアエアスト ウオルルドハムで生まれた時，父Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghershは37歳，母Countess Elizabeth de Verdunは19歳であった。約1343年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアエウエルメでMaud de Kerdestonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1349年6月30日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアエウエルメで25歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアエウエルメにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Burghersh(이)가 1324년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이스트 워드함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Elizabeth de Verdun(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1343년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 웰에서 Maud de Kerdeston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1349년 6월 30일 영국 스퍼드실르 웰에서 25세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 웰에 묻혔다.

pt.East Worldham, Alton, Hampshire, England: East Worldham, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Burghersh nasceu em 1324, em East Worldham, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Kerdeston aproximadamente 1343, em Ewelme, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 30 de junho de 1349, em Ewelme, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 25 anos, e foi sepultado em Ewelme, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ro.East Worldham, Alton, Hampshire, England: East Worldham, Hampshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Burghersh родился в 1324 г. в местности эаст ворлдхам, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Kerdeston около 1343 г. в местности ювелм, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 30 июня 1349 г. в местности ювелм, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 25 лет и был похоронен в местности ювелм, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Burghersh nació en 1324, en East Worldham, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Maud de Kerdeston aproximadamente 1343, en Ewelme, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 30 de junio de 1349, en Ewelme, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 25 años, y fue sepultado en Ewelme, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
